nasb.text: But, O Lord of hosts, who judges righteously, Who tries the feelings and the heart, Let me see Your vengeance on them, For to You have I committed my cause.

esv.text: But, O Lord of hosts, who judges righteously, who tests the heart and the mind, let me see your vengeance upon them, for to you have I committed my cause.

cnv.text: 但萬軍之耶和華啊！你是憑公義審判人， 試驗人肺腑和心腸的。 求你讓我看見你在他們身上施行的報復， 因為我已經把我的案件向你陳明了。

ccb.text: 然而，审判公正、洞察肺腑心肠的万军之耶和华啊， 愿我能看见你报应他们， 因为我已向你陈明我的冤屈。
